text: Artificial intelligence is increasingly common in the modern workplace. One major benefit is automation, which handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling, freeing employees for more creative work. Productivity tools powered by AI also help workers analyse information faster and make better decisions. Instead of replacing people, many companies focus on human-AI collaboration, where humans and machines work together to achieve better results. Of course, this shift means job changes for some roles, as certain tasks disappear while new ones emerge. Workers may need to learn new skills, such as managing AI systems or interpreting their outputs. Ultimately, AI offers great potential when used as a partner, not a threat.
